title: order by random_bytes has no effect
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (Id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(50), Value DECIMAL(10,2), CreatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO TestTable (Name, Value) VALUES ('Beta', NULL);
SELECT * FROM TestTable ORDER BY RANDOM();
key_bug_features: order by random_bytes(8) does not randomize results
